assessor_1_raw:

Clean temporal design, 3-month protective gap, equal tuning, intermediate baseline for capacity ablation. No violations. Verdict: defense_wins.

Temporal split is sound. Account cohort restriction ensures sufficient history. Per-account normalization is within-window. No leakage concerns. Verdict: defense_wins.
